name: Currant Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Grease a cookie sheet.
2. In a small bowl, combine the half-and-half cream, currants, and beaten egg.
3. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
4. Using a pastry blender, cut in the butter until the mixture resembles fine crumbs.
5. Stir in the currant mixture with a fork.
6. On a floured surface, knead the dough lightly 4 or 5 times (the dough will be sticky).
7. Pat the dough into a 3/4-inch-thick rectangle. Cut with a floured 1 1/2-inch scalloped cutter and place on the prepared cookie sheet.
8. Reroll any scraps and cut additional pieces to fit the space.
9. Brush the tops of the scones with 1 tablespoon cream.
10. Bake for 18 minutes, or until golden brown. Makes 32 scones.
Calories: 80 per serving
Total fat: 4g
Sodium: 114 mg
Cholesterol: 17mg
